title: Build CommandCenterUI local app backend
description: Turn the approved Studio CommandCenterUI prototype into a real local app by adding a Python backend, live MAP/hcom read APIs, guarded hcom send endpoint, and a local launcher. Keep artifacts under Projects/CommandCenterUI unless explicit approval is granted for desktop/menu installation.
acceptance_criteria: Local app starts from a launcher script without external dependency installation
Backend serves Studio UI and exposes read-only MAP task/event/status data
Backend exposes guarded hcom send capability with explicit intent/recipient/body inputs
User has a clear path or URL to open the app
Claude reviews before TASK-056 is marked done
